notes: The coin-pickup jingle (R-SYS-006): a DCC-imported clip (R-ASSET-001) routed to the Sound Effects bus, fired ONCE when the gameplay system detects the player overlapping the Coin entity. Non-spatial (a UI-style pickup chime plays at full gain regardless of listener distance). Fired on miniaudio's NULL backend in the headless smoke gate, off the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001).
